name: Alejandra Torres

behaviour_pool: Always has a next destination planned. Restless indoors; comes alive in nature or unfamiliar places.
Risk-tolerant and resourceful; treats discomfort as a feature, not a bug.
Collects experiences over things; her stories are her most prized possessions.
Physically fearless but emotionally thoughtful; challenge brings out her best self.
Lives by a loose itinerary; plans enough to launch but leaves room for serendipity.
Adaptable and observant; absorbs local cultures quickly and respectfully.
Independent to a fault — deeply values a partner who has their own adventures.
Practical and calm in a crisis; falls apart over small social stresses instead.
Has strong opinions about gear, routes, and the ethics of travel.
communication_style_pool: direct and story-driven, communicates best through shared experiences
enthusiastic and kinetic, uses her whole body when she talks
candid and no-nonsense, cuts to the chase
light and playful with a gift for dry adventure-story humour
calm under pressure, measured when it matters
warm and inclusive, brings people into her stories
visual thinker who communicates in pictures and metaphors
honest to the point of bluntness, hates vagueness
energetic and infectious, raises the room's energy
relationship_goals_pool: a partner who will share adventures and has their own independent life
someone to explore the world with — literally and figuratively
a relationship built on shared experiences and mutual courage
a secure base to return to after going far
someone unintimidated by her independence who brings their own
a partner who says yes to last-minute plans
connection built through doing, not talking about doing
a partner who appreciates stories more than stability
someone who challenges her and matches her energy

behaviour: Always has a next destination planned. Restless indoors; comes alive in nature or unfamiliar places.
communication_style: direct and story-driven, communicates best through shared experiences
relationship_goals: a partner who will share adventures and has their own independent life
background: Visited 60 countries before 26. Writes about the places tourism forgot. Learned to pack in a carry-on by necessity.
